settings.text: Every celebration needs a different level of support. Our collections are designed to meet you with the right mix of strategy, design guidance, and hands-on coordination.

settings.title: Choose the level of support that fits your season
settings.description: Each collection keeps the experience personal, but the scope expands based on how much partnership you want from the start.

settings.title: Essentials
settings.features:
+ Final-month coordination
+ Personalized timeline
+ Vendor confirmations
+ Rehearsal guidance
+ Wedding day management

settings.title: Signature
settings.features:
+ Planning and design direction
+ Vendor shortlist support
+ Budget pacing and logistics
+ Guest experience guidance
+ Wedding day management

settings.title: Weekend
settings.features:
+ Full weekend planning
+ Welcome party and rehearsal support
+ Design development across events
+ Guest logistics and transitions
+ Multi-day production oversight

settings.title: From first inquiry to final send-off
settings.description: Our process is built to keep the planning season clear, collaborative, and beautifully paced.

settings.title: Inquiry and consultation
settings.description: We start with your date, priorities, guest experience, and the kind of support that will make the season feel lighter.

settings.title: Design and planning foundation
settings.description: Once we begin, we shape the design direction, planning priorities, and vendor framework that will guide every decision.

settings.title: Logistics and production
settings.description: As the date approaches, we refine timelines, manage communication, and make sure every moving part has a home.

settings.title: Wedding weekend execution
settings.description: On the day itself, we are there to protect the experience, guide the flow, and make space for you to enjoy what you planned.

settings.title: A few questions couples ask before moving forward
settings.description: Helpful details around scope, timing, and what is included.

settings.question: Do you only plan local weddings?
settings.answer: No. We plan Charleston celebrations and destination weekends, with scope adjusted for travel and guest logistics.

settings.question: Can we book design support without full planning?
settings.answer: Depending on your date and needs, yes. We can talk through whether a partial planning approach is the better fit.

settings.question: When do vendor recommendations begin?
settings.answer: As soon as your collection and priorities are confirmed, we start building a vendor path that fits the tone and logistics of your celebration.

settings.question: Do you manage rehearsal dinner or welcome party details?
settings.answer: Yes. Our weekend-level support is especially helpful for couples planning multiple guest-facing events across several days.

settings.question: What is the first step if we are interested?
settings.answer: Reach out through the contact page with your date, venue if you have one, and the kind of experience you are hoping to create.

settings.title: Inquiry notes
settings.text:
Share your date, venue, guest count, and what kind of support you are looking for.

We will reply within two business days.
